metadata.title: GRAPHICS.DAT Complete Variant Inventory
metadata.source: ReDMCSB WIP20210206 + original game data on N2

primary_files.role: Graphic index constants, count constants, format flag
Platform-specific memory layout for GRAPHICS.DAT globals (NEC PC-98)
Dungeon view rendering; references graphic indices for floor/wall/stairs/door sets

key_globals.name: G0636_ppuc_Graphics
key_globals.purpose: Per-graphic offset table (4 entries per graphic in new format: offset, compressed size, width, height)

new_format.per_graphic_entry: 4 x int32_t (offset, compressed size, width, height)

variants.name: DM1 PC v3.4 — English
variants.notes: Primary DM1 PC variant. ReDMCSB source directly maps this format.

variants.name: DM1 PC v3.4 — Multilingual
variants.notes: 35,508 bytes larger than English variant. Likely contains additional localized text graphics.

variants.name: CSB Amiga — French
variants.path: /home/trv2/.openclaw/data/firestaff-original-games/DM/_extracted/csb-amiga/HardDisk/Chaos Strikes Back for Amiga v3.3 (French) Hacked by Meynaf/DungeonMaster/Graphics.DAT
variants.notes: Amiga-specific variant. 384 graphics in old format. Not directly compatible with PC offset table layout.

variants.name: CSB Atari ST
variants.notes: Atari ST is big-endian. Header word 0x0233 (BE) = 563 graphics, matching M514_GRAPHIC_COUNT = 563 for DM1 PC v1.x. May be a DM1-era Atari ST file repackaged as CSB, or CSB reusing DM1's graphic count.

variants.name: Spanish GRAPHICS.DAT
variants.notes: Significantly larger than other variants (8.6 MB vs. 319-435 KB). Format ID 5 is not documented in ReDMCSB source. May contain uncompressed or differently compressed assets. Requires further investigation.
variants.blocker: Format ID 5 is unknown. ReDMCSB source does not handle this format.

symlink_groups.target: /home/trv2/.openclaw/data/firestaff-original-games/DM/_extracted/csb-amiga/HardDisk/Chaos Strikes Back for Amiga v3.3 (French) Hacked by Meynaf/DungeonMaster/Graphics.DAT

hash_comparison.note: All 5 distinct variants have unique SHA256 hashes and sizes. No duplicates outside of symlinks.

dm1-pc34-new-format.offset_table: G0636_ppuc_Graphics: 4 x int32 per graphic (offset, compressed size, width, height)
dm1-pc34-new-format.notes: English and multilingual variants share the same format ID and likely the same graphic index layout. Multilingual variant is 35,508 bytes larger, suggesting additional localized text graphics or higher-resolution assets. Without decoding the full offset table, exact per-index differences cannot be determined.

csb-amiga-old-format.offset_table: G0636_ppuc_Graphics: 2 x int32 per graphic (offset, compressed size)
csb-amiga-old-format.notes: Amiga-specific variant. Different color depth, resolution, and possibly different asset layout than PC. Cannot safely compare indices with PC variants without Amiga-specific decoding.

csb-atari-old-format.offset_table: G0636_ppuc_Graphics: 2 x int32 per graphic (offset, compressed size)
csb-atari-old-format.notes: 563 graphics matches M514_GRAPHIC_COUNT = 563 for DM1 PC v1.x. File is labeled as CSB but may be DM1-era. Cannot safely compare indices with PC variants without Atari-specific decoding.

spanish-format-5.notes: Format ID 5 is not documented in ReDMCSB source. 8.6 MB size suggests uncompressed or differently compressed assets. Cannot safely determine graphic count, index layout, or asset classes without format ID 5 decoding.
spanish-format-5.blocker: Format ID 5 is unknown. ReDMCSB source does not handle this format.

gaps_and_blockers.title: Format ID 5 (Spanish GRAPHICS.DAT)
gaps_and_blockers.description: ReDMCSB source only documents format ID 1. Format ID 5 is unknown and cannot be decoded with current source. The file is 8.6 MB (24x larger than other variants), suggesting a fundamentally different storage format.

gaps_and_blockers.title: Platform-specific variants (Amiga, Atari ST)
gaps_and_blockers.description: These use old format with different graphic counts (384 and 563 respectively). ReDMCSB source is PC-centric and may not handle platform-specific offset table layouts. Cannot safely compare indices across platforms without platform-specific decoding.

gaps_and_blockers.title: CSB Atari ST identity
gaps_and_blockers.description: The Atari ST file has 563 graphics (matching DM1 PC v1.x count), but is labeled as CSB. Unclear whether this is a DM1-era file repackaged as CSB, or CSB reusing DM1's graphic count. Requires content analysis to confirm.

gaps_and_blockers.title: Per-graphic asset class mapping
gaps_and_blockers.description: ReDMCSB source defines mandatory graphic indices in DATA.C (G0018_ai_Graphic* tables), but these are version-gated. Without knowing the exact version of each GRAPHICS.DAT variant, the correct index table cannot be selected.

gaps_and_blockers.title: Compression format
gaps_and_blockers.description: ReDMCSB uses F0355_IMAGE_GetImage for decompression, but the compression algorithm is not documented in the source. Cannot extract individual assets without implementing the decompression routine.
